sourceMovie.title: Children of Men
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Children of Men works as a science fiction movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The science fiction and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: World War Z
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Children of Men clicked for you, World War Z (2013) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: V for Vendetta
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Children of Men clicked for you, V for Vendetta (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Children of Men?
faq.answer: Try World War Z, V for Vendetta, The Terminator—each shares DNA with Children of Men while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Children of Men?
faq.answer: Children of Men (2006) is best described as Science Fiction, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Children of Men worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
